# Client Request: Internal Expense Approval Workflow

We want to modernize how our finance team approves employee expense reports. The objective is to cut the average approval time in half. The main users are the finance approvers and the employees who submit expenses.

In scope for the first release: submitting an expense report, routing it for approval, and notifying the employee of the decision. Out of scope: corporate card reconciliation and accounting system posting.

Security and performance are important to us, and the solution must respect our compliance obligations. There are business rules around approval thresholds that the system should apply. Quality matters, so the tool has to be reliable. We will consider the project successful once approvers are happy with it.
